text: A day for April Fool’s Day jokes!
Happiness depends upon ourselves. — Aristotle
The unexamined life is not worth living. — Socrates
I think, therefore I am. — René Descartes
Raise your words, not your voice. It is rain that grows flowers, not thunder. — Rumi
Man is condemned to be free. — Jean-Paul Sartre
No man ever steps in the same river twice. — Heraclitus
He who conquers himself is the mightiest warrior. — Confucius
Entities should not be multiplied unnecessarily. — William of Ockham
God is dead. — Friedrich Nietzsche
Speak good or remain silent. — Prophet Muhammad
To be is to be perceived. — George Berkeley
The only thing I know is that I know nothing. — Socrates
Silence is a source of great strength. — Lao Tzu
Tax Day: A reminder to file and pay taxes in the United States.
Life must be understood backward. But it must be lived forward. — Søren Kierkegaard
What you seek is seeking you. — Rumi
Happiness is not an ideal of reason but of imagination. — Immanuel Kant
Do not grieve; indeed, Allah is with us. — Quran 9:40
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished. — Lao Tzu
Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom. — Aristotle
Earth Day: A day to support environmental protection worldwide.
Set your life on fire. Seek those who fan your flames. — Rumi
The greater the difficulty, the more glory in surmounting it. — Epicurus
Trust in God, but tie your camel. — Prophet Muhammad
Man is the measure of all things. — Protagoras
A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step. — Lao Tzu
The wound is the place where the Light enters you. — Rumi
Whereof one cannot speak, thereof one must be silent. — Ludwig Wittgenstein
Seek knowledge from the cradle to the grave. — Prophet Muhammad
